text:
Pre-Order Vouchers (強制予約券) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. These vouchers when used, will guarantee that you get the item written on it without fail. Of course you don't get the item free! 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Pre-Order Vouchers (強制予約券): This card allows the caster to gain a book containing 1000 Pre-Order Vouchers. You can write the name down of any commercially available product onto the voucher and you are guaranteed to get it, regardless of how rare or unavailable the product is. Of course, you are still required to pay! The voucher is destroyed after use. The book is destroyed when no more vouchers are left.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.029 - 強制予約券 
どんな商品でもこの券に商品名を書くと必ず手に入る。ただし市販されているものでないと効果はない。もちろん代金は支払わなければならない。1000枚入り。
|-
![Eng]
|No.029 - Pre-Order Vouchers 
Come to hand whenever you write a product of any brand name on this ticket. It is not affected by the commercial availability. You have to pay the price of course! 1000 pieces.
|}
